CustomField.description: Reviewer approval gate. For Approval-Gated acknowledgments (all print, and approval-tier emails), a reviewer sets this to true to release the letter/email. The Auto send mode ignores it. JSI-87 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to approve this acknowledgment to be sent/printed (for approval-gated gifts).
CustomField.label: Acknowledgment Approved
